scenarios.description: parse(String html, String baseUri) with empty html returns empty body fragment Document
scenarios.expectedResult: Document returned has baseUri=="http://foo" and Document.body().html()==""

scenarios.description: parse(String html, String baseUri, Parser parser) with xmlParser parses xml style input
scenarios.expectedResult: Document returned uses xml parser semantics: Document.outputSettings().syntax()==Document.OutputSettings.Syntax.xml
pseudocode: TEST TC03_O2 parse xml with custom parser
String html = "<root><child/></root>"; String baseUri=""; Parser parser = Parser.xmlParser();

scenarios.description: parse(InputStream in, String charsetName, String baseUri) with multi-byte and fallback charset
scenarios.precondition: InputStream stub that returns UTF-16 bytes for "Ä"; use stubbed DataUtil.load by in-memory InputStream
pseudocode: TEST TC08_O11 parse inputStream with charset
InputStream in=new ByteArrayInputStream("Ä".getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_16)); String charset="UTF-16"; String baseUri="base";

scenarios.description: parse(URL url, int timeoutMillis) with valid HTTP URL returns fetched Document
scenarios.precondition: mock HttpConnection.connect(URL) to return Connection stub whose get() returns Document with body.html()=="X"; mocking needed to avoid network
pseudocode: TEST TC09_O14 parse URL with timeout

URL url=new URL("http://test"); int timeout=1000; stub HttpConnection.connect(url) to return conStub; stub conStub.timeout(timeout) returns conStub; stub conStub.get() returns Document d with body.html()=="X";

scenarios.description: parse(URL url, int timeoutMillis) throws MalformedURLException when URL protocol is ftp
